_meta.description: Prompt corpus for primitive_projection shadow-mode evaluation

categories.camera_motion: Prompts describing camera movement (dolly, pan, zoom, orbit, etc.)
categories.camera_framing: Prompts describing shots, angles, POV, focus
categories.unrelated: General scene prose with no primitive signal
categories.ambiguous: Mixed-signal prompts that could match multiple categories or none

corpus.text: Slow dolly forward toward the subject.
Camera pans left across the cityscape.
Zoom in tightly on her face.
The camera tilts upward to reveal the building.
Truck left alongside the walking couple.
Orbit around the dancer as she spins.
Fast zoom out to show the whole battlefield.

Pan right to follow the runner.
Camera orbits the statue in a full circle.
Slow tilt down from the sky to the ground.
Dolly backward away from the explosion.

Camera zooms in from a wide shot.

Zoom slowly into the character's eyes.

A beautiful sunset paints the sky in orange and purple.
Two friends share a laugh over coffee at the corner cafe.
Rain falls gently on the cobblestone street.
The old bookstore smells of leather and vanilla.
She wears a flowing red dress.
A vintage car parked under the elm tree.
The detective examines the crime scene carefully.

Three soldiers march across the dusty road.
The cat stretches lazily on the windowsill.
A single candle illuminates the dark room.
corpus.notes: Light source but not lighting directive

corpus.text: The spaceship drifts silently through the asteroid field.
She pours tea into the porcelain cup.
The old photograph shows a family picnic by the lake.
A robot assembles circuit boards on the factory floor.
The wizard raises his staff and chants the spell.
Dense fog covers the entire valley floor.
Two samurai face each other at dawn.
The library is quiet, with dust motes floating in the air.
A wedding reception in a grand ballroom.
The pirate ship sails into the storm.
Fresh paint dries on the canvas in the studio.
A violin solo fills the concert hall.
The train pulls into the station at midnight.
Cherry blossoms fall from the trees.
An astronaut floats weightlessly inside the space station.
The marketplace is bustling with vendors and shoppers.
A lone wolf howls at the full moon.
The submarine descends into the deep ocean trench.
Confetti rains down on the celebrating crowd.
A spider spins its web between two branches.
The professor writes equations on the chalkboard.
Lightning strikes the old oak tree in the field.
A couple dances under the stars.
The blacksmith hammers the glowing metal.
Birds migrate in a V formation across the sky.
A grandfather tells stories by the fireplace.
The race car speeds around the final lap.
Freshly baked bread cools on the kitchen counter.
A painter captures the landscape en plein air.
The ancient ruins stand against the stormy sky.
A surfer rides the perfect wave.
The chandelier sparkles in the grand foyer.
A magician pulls a rabbit from his hat.
Snow falls silently across the empty parking lot.
The boxer throws a powerful right hook.
A campfire crackles under the starry sky.
The ballerina performs a perfect pirouette.
Autumn leaves crunch underfoot on the forest path.
A knight rides through the castle gates.
The scientist peers through the microscope.
Desert sand stretches to the horizon.
A jazz band performs in a dimly lit club.
The helicopter lands on the hospital rooftop.
A fisherman casts his line into the still lake.
The dragon soars above the burning village.
A photographer adjusts her lens aperture.
The barista steams milk for a latte.
A gymnast sticks the landing perfectly.
Fireflies glow in the summer evening meadow.
The chef flames the dessert tableside.
A gardener prunes the rose bushes.
The orchestra tunes up before the performance.
A delivery truck turns the corner slowly.
Camera shot of a man walking forward slowly.
corpus.notes: Mix: camera role-only + subject motion + direction. 'camera' and 'shot' are stop tokens

corpus.text: The subject turns left while the camera pans right.
corpus.notes: Mix: subject motion + camera motion in one sentence

corpus.text: Warm light from behind creates a rim effect.
Looking down from above.
corpus.notes: Direction or camera angle? Multiple matches possible

corpus.text: Close-up dolly forward with shallow focus.
Standing behind the subject near the wall.
The light is harsh and cool, backlighting the figure.
Move forward then zoom out.
Eye level medium shot with soft warm lighting.
A wide landscape scene.
corpus.notes: Wide is a shot term but could be scene description

corpus.text: Camera shot.
corpus.notes: EDGE: role-only, both words are stop tokens, should NOT match

corpus.text: Shot.
Scene.
Motion.
Direction.
Light.
corpus.notes: EDGE: single word that could match lighting

corpus.text: She holds the camera and walks forward.
corpus.notes: False friend: camera as prop, not directive

corpus.text: The light truck drives slowly down the road.
corpus.notes: False friend: truck as vehicle, light as weight

corpus.text: He pans for gold in the river.
corpus.notes: False friend: pan as gold panning

corpus.text: The orbit of the planet takes 365 days.
Focus on what matters most in life.
corpus.notes: False friend: focus as abstract concept

corpus.text: A crane lifts the steel beam.
corpus.notes: False friend: crane as construction equipment

corpus.text: She tilts her head and smiles.
corpus.notes: False friend: head tilt as character action

corpus.text: The zoom meeting starts at three.
She tracks mud through the hallway.
The slow truck rumbles past.
corpus.notes: False friend: truck as vehicle + slow

corpus.text: A massive low angle building dominates the skyline.
High contrast photograph of the mountain.
corpus.notes: Photographic term, not a lighting directive

corpus.text: He takes a wide stance before the pitch.
Close up the window, it's getting cold.
corpus.notes: False friend: close up as action verb

corpus.text: The subject moves forward with purpose. Camera orbits slowly. Soft warm light fills the space.
Low angle dolly forward tracking the hero as she runs through backlit fog with shallow depth of field.
corpus.notes: Kitchen-sink: angle + motion + subject + lighting + focus all at once

corpus.text: Medium close-up over-the-shoulder shot with rack focus from warm rim light.
Move the light to the left.
corpus.notes: Instruction not prompt. Mix: light + left + move

corpus.text: Dolly.
corpus.notes: EDGE: single specific word - should it match?

corpus.text: Zoom.
Pan.
corpus.notes: EDGE: single specific word, also cooking vessel

corpus.text: Tilt.
A slow forward movement.
corpus.notes: Vague motion - could be subject or camera

corpus.text: Speed ramp from slow to fast as the camera pushes in.
The shallow end of the pool.
corpus.notes: False friend: shallow as pool depth

corpus.text: Hand-held tracking shot through the forest.
corpus.notes: Camera technique without specific motion type

corpus.text: Warm and soft texture of the cashmere sweater.
corpus.notes: False friend: warm + soft as fabric descriptor

corpus.text: Hard left turn on the mountain road.
corpus.notes: False friend: hard + left as driving

corpus.text: The rim of the coffee cup catches the light.
corpus.notes: False friend: rim as cup edge

corpus.text: Deep in the forest, a cabin awaits.
corpus.notes: False friend: deep as spatial depth, not DOF

corpus.text: First person to arrive gets the prize.
corpus.notes: False friend: first person as ordinal

corpus.text: Third person narrative style.
corpus.notes: False friend: third person as literary POV

corpus.text: Rapid zoom into the keyhole.
Smooth orbit around the fountain.
Tilt from the boots to the hat.
Dolly out to reveal the full scene.
Pan 180 degrees to show the room.
Extreme wide establishing view of the city.
Tight close-up detail shot.
Low angle worm's-eye perspective.
Shallow bokeh on the main character.
Focus pull from front to back.
Seated with legs crossed casually.
Looking directly into the viewer's eyes.
Hands making a fist.
corpus.notes: Fist is a hands gesture but not a specific variant

corpus.text: Object placed in front of the character.
Flying above the cityscape.
Crouching below the table.
Standing near the doorway.
Walking to the left side of the room.
Backlit figure against the bright sky.
Rim light separating subject from dark background.
Flat neutral even lighting for product photography.
She looks away gently.
He leans forward toward the table.
Hands pointing at the map.
Walking slowly to the right.
Subject turns around dramatically.
Focus on the warm soft glow and the subject's low crouching pose near the left wall.
corpus.notes: Kitchen-sink: light + pose + placement in one sentence

corpus.text: The dolly grip adjusts the rig between takes.
corpus.notes: False friend: dolly as equipment, not camera motion

corpus.text: She racks the pool balls on the table.
The truck tilts as it goes over the speed bump.
corpus.notes: False friend: truck + tilt as vehicle physics

corpus.text: A wide open field stretches to the horizon.
corpus.notes: False friend: wide as spatial, not shot size

corpus.text: The elevator doors open to reveal the penthouse.
A street musician plays guitar on the corner.
The alarm clock buzzes at six in the morning.
Two kids build a sandcastle on the beach.
A mechanic slides under the car to inspect.
